name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Conversation with Dr. Ben Carson and Kirk Cameron - My Faith Votes LIVE TeleForum™
body:
A Conversation with Dr. Ben Carson & Kirk Cameron | [View this email in your browser. ](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vsP56FTbNR)
---|---

**
** **
** **
"You have the ability to choose which way you want to go. You have to believe great things are going to happen in your life. Do everything you can - prepare, pray and achieve - to make it happen."** -Ben Carson

**" What we need is to remember who we are and Whose we are, and elect leaders who will represent His ways in our land."** -Kirk Cameron

Join Dr. Ben Carson, Actor Kirk Cameron and the My Faith Votes team as we discuss how every Christian is empowered to make a difference and revive our nation. During this exciting call you will be invited to listen, converse and ask questions of Dr. Carson and Mr. Cameron.

[Sign up now for this once in a lifetime TeleForumTM opportunity on Monday, August 22nd at 8:00 PM (ET) / 5:00 PM (PT).](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37114476:sP56FTbNR:m:1:876315805:CBABD739167E94054E40C657FA39D05E:r)

Dr. Carson will be hosting this live TeleForumTM event with Kirk Cameron right from his living room and you are invited to join in. This TeleForumTM promises to be one of the highlights of our My Faith Votes Interactive series of the summer and is scheduled for [Monday, August 22nd at 8:00 PM (ET) / 5:00 PM (PT)](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37114476:sP56FTbNR:m:1:876315805:CBABD739167E94054E40C657FA39D05E:r). Along with our standard audio format over your phone, this event will be a live video event with streaming video both on Facebook Live and [My Faith Votes' website](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37114476:sP56FTbNR:m:1:876315805:CBABD739167E94054E40C657FA39D05E:r).

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America.
**Join the My Faith Votes LIVE TeleForum TM Town Hall Event**
Date: Thursday, August 18th
Time: 8:00 PM (ET) / 5:00 PM (PT)
Sign up link: [A Conversation with Dr. Ben Carson & Kirk Cameron](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37114476:sP56FTbNR:m:1:876315805:CBABD739167E94054E40C657FA39D05E:r)
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.bencarson.com/p/isP56FTbNR). [Update your preferences](http://email.bencarson.com/p/osP56FTbNR)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.bencarson.com/p/osP56FTbNR) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-36669291858-echo3-6573F8886B81C6B647D15994E69B39E6@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Kellyanne=20Conway=2C=20Team=20Trump?=
subject: I want you to play a critical role
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I am Donald Trump’s new campaign manager. |

Peter, I am proud to join the team as Mr. Trump’s new campaign manager. Yesterday I asked him to give me a list of our strongest supporters. Your name showed up on the list as a Big League supporter. Which is why I’m asking for your valuable input on the state of the race and the issues you care about. Please complete the Platform for America Survey today. You’ve probably received a few surveys from us over the past month already. These surveys play a crucial role in helping us shape our message and ensuring we’re on track to WIN. But we still have a lot to do, and little time to do it. We have LESS than 80 days to: Broaden our support and win over the hearts of undecided voters Fight back against Hillary’s slanderous attacks with ads of our own Execute a massive, nationwide grassroots ground game Your honest, critical feedback helps us keep our campaign on message -- and ensures it’s resonating with the American people. Take the Survey Now >> I don’t have to tell you -- the mainstream media is always going to try to distort our message. But my job is to help cut through the media’s noise and get our message straight to the voter. To successfully do that, I need your help. I need to know where you stand on a variety of issues facing our country. Between now and November 8, every single day counts. Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey. Thank you, Peter. I look forward to reading your responses, Kellyanne Conway Campaign Manager Donald Trump for President TAKE SURVEY NOW

Please complete the Platform for America Survey today.
------------------------------------------------------
http://rnctracking.gop/t/eckbaHJjQANQcZ8MnaF0JtDRMN6aaaaLWTgBL0QYA9a?k=~@rHrFzD&U=nf6YvbsiEx_qckYv.Syc&v=Y&7=&h=-yAq~wIVyS4iIex0si2koiIYxXIZpSIfIfIXp01&fIf

Take the Survey Now >>

Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Marco Rubio
subject: AUDIO: I just recorded this for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
Do you have two minutes to listen to this important message? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37110008:W96ay8bNW:m:1:1284014958:F6CE46983EEFD6E42C282A8810A28C22:r)
---

Hey Friend -- Do you have two minutes?

I just recorded an important message for you and **[I need you to listen right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37110008:W96ay8bNW:m:1:1284014958:F6CE46983EEFD6E42C282A8810A28C22:r)**

| [** LISTEN NOW >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37110008:W96ay8bNW:m:1:1284014958:F6CE46983EEFD6E42C282A8810A28C22:r)
---

This race is going to come down to the wire, and I'm facing a very tough re-election campaign.

All eyes are on Florida, and I need your help before my August 30th primary.

**[Please, Friend, just follow this link to listen to my message. It's just two minutes, promise.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37110008:W96ay8bNW:m:1:1284014958:F6CE46983EEFD6E42C282A8810A28C22:r)**

Thanks for your continued support. I am blessed to have your friendship and support.

Thanks,

Marco Rubio

[** LISTEN NOW >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37110008:W96ay8bNW:m:1:1284014958:F6CE46983EEFD6E42C282A8810A28C22:r)

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016

name: McGinty Rapid Response Team
subject: Mitch McConnell is getting desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5552801867961991168/8928128975541108736?refcode=e20160820&refcode2=e20160820nd&amount=25)
---
Look at this -- Mitch McConnell is feeling the heat. Just look at what he told reporters: **_McConnell: GOP chances to keep Senate are 'very dicey'_**
_- Associated Press (August 11)_ He has good reason to be worried. He desperately needs Pat Toomey as another rubber-stamp for his twisted political agenda (and Supreme Court blockade) in the Senate -- but we've turned this contest into a neck-and-neck horse race:

**_FIRST_ :** Quinnipiac's breaking poll showed Katie has a RAZOR-THIN LEAD over Toomey

**_THEN_ :** McConnell was forced to admit, "I may or may not be calling the shots next year"

**_NOW_ :** **_Rothenberg & Gonzales Political Report just upgraded our race to "Pure Tossup"_**

**We need to work hard and fast to strike while the iron is hot.[Can you chip in $5 to help us beat Pat Toomey and Mitch McConnell before it's too late? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5552801867961991168/8928128975541108736?refcode=e20160820&refcode2=e20160820nd&amount=25)**

**[Quick: Make a rapid response donation>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5552801867961991168/8928128975541108736?refcode=e20160820&refcode2=e20160820nd&amount=25)**
We have to act fast -

McGinty Rapid Response Team

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5552801867961991168/8928128975541108736?refcode=e20160820&refcode2=e20160820nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5552801867961991168/8856071381503180800).

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Cole Leystra, RussFeingold.com
subject: Not afraid to talk about climate change
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Here's the truth, according to science: | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsH/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/") Friend, Senator Ron Johnson is a climate change denier. Check out his latest quote about climate change, which PolitiFact quickly rated "False": "First of all, the climate hasn't warmed in quite a few years. I mean, that is proven scientifically. So, that's why they've changed the terminology from global warming to climate change -- that covers everything." Fifteen of the 16 warmest years on record have occurred since 2001, with the two highest years being 2014 and 2015. [**That's why we're pushing back on Senator Ron Johnson and the special-interest groups that are fighting against action on climate change. Add your name right now to stand with Russ, Senator Jeff Merkley, and Democratic candidates for Senate: We need to combat climate change and overturn _Citizens United._**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsE/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsF/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsC/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/") While leaders like Russ Feingold are working on solutions to combat climate change, Senator Johnson is literally lying about the realities of the situation. Why? Because his right-wing bosses, like the Koch brothers, are calling all the shots. To earn their support, Senator Johnson has to toe the party line. But here's the truth according to science: The climate is warming. Humans can fix this problem, but we have to start by talking the issue at hand. We can adopt clean energy technologies, and we can fight the corporate forces that continue to fight back against taking action on climate change. From Big Oil to the Koch brothers, the world's worst polluters are using dark money to drive an anti-science agenda and block pollution regulations and green energy. If we're going to prevent a climate catastrophe we need to act fast -- and that means fighting back against the polluters and taking our democracy back. Russ is joining with Senator Jeff Merkley to call on Congress to get tough on super PACs and challenge the Supreme Court to overturn _Citizens United._ [**Will you add your name right now to stand with Russ, Senator Merkley, and Democratic candidates for Senate? Let's push for action to combat climate change and overturn _Citizens United_ together.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsD/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/") It's going to take a concerted effort to get Senator Johnson and his fellow Republicans in Congress to face the truth. Thanks for standing with us on this one. Cole Leystra
Deputy Campaign Manager | [I'M A CLIMATE VOTER »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f71/3946713342/VEsA/ "https://www.climatechamps.us/petition/clean-up-politics/feingold/")
---

If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4453/1c469400/7cb10d4/3573f6c/3946713342/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). clean_body: Here's the truth, according to science: | "" Friend, Senator Ron Johnson is a climate change denier. Check out his latest quote about climate change, which PolitiFact quickly rated "False": "First of all, the climate hasn't warmed in quite a few years. I mean, that is proven scientifically. So, that's why they've changed the terminology from global warming to climate change -- that covers everything." Fifteen of the 16 warmest years on record have occurred since 2001, with the two highest years being 2014 and 2015. "" "" "" While leaders like Russ Feingold are working on solutions to combat climate change, Senator Johnson is literally lying about the realities of the situation. Why? Because his right-wing bosses, like the Koch brothers, are calling all the shots. To earn their support, Senator Johnson has to toe the party line. But here's the truth according to science: The climate is warming. Humans can fix this problem, but we have to start by talking the issue at hand. We can adopt clean energy technologies, and we can fight the corporate forces that continue to fight back against taking action on climate change. From Big Oil to the Koch brothers, the world's worst polluters are using dark money to drive an anti-science agenda and block pollution regulations and green energy. If we're going to prevent a climate catastrophe we need to act fast -- and that means fighting back against the polluters and taking our democracy back. Russ is joining with Senator Jeff Merkley to call on Congress to get tough on super PACs and challenge the Supreme Court to overturn Citizens United. "" It's going to take a concerted effort to get Senator Johnson and his fellow Republicans in Congress to face the truth. Thanks for standing with us on this one. Cole Leystra Deputy Campaign Manager | ""

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Kellyanne=20Conway=2C=20Team=20Trump?=
subject: I want you to play a critical role
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I am Donald Trump’s new campaign manager. |

Peter, I am proud to join the team as Mr. Trump’s new campaign manager. Yesterday I asked him to give me a list of our strongest supporters. Your name showed up on the list as a Big League supporter. Which is why I’m asking for your valuable input on the state of the race and the issues you care about. Please complete the Platform for America Survey today. You’ve probably received a few surveys from us over the past month already. These surveys play a crucial role in helping us shape our message and ensuring we’re on track to WIN. But we still have a lot to do, and little time to do it. We have LESS than 80 days to: Broaden our support and win over the hearts of undecided voters Fight back against Hillary’s slanderous attacks with ads of our own Execute a massive, nationwide grassroots ground game Your honest, critical feedback helps us keep our campaign on message -- and ensures it’s resonating with the American people. Take the Survey Now >> I don’t have to tell you -- the mainstream media is always going to try to distort our message. But my job is to help cut through the media’s noise and get our message straight to the voter. To successfully do that, I need your help. I need to know where you stand on a variety of issues facing our country. Between now and November 8, every single day counts. Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey. Thank you, Peter. I look forward to reading your responses, Kellyanne Conway Campaign Manager Donald Trump for President TAKE SURVEY NOW

Please complete the Platform for America Survey today.
------------------------------------------------------

Take the Survey Now >>

Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Dan Hennessey
subject: Saturday plans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Next Saturday, August 27th, we'll be hosting our first statewide Super Saturday event to contact Hoosie
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/300448c23f4c498798afc032c4143fda?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1322ae0c17d24d6c819430cce03b31fc&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Campaign&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160820-saturday-plans-13704-direct) |
| Friend, **Next Saturday, August 27th, we'll be hosting our first statewide Super Saturday event to contact Hoosiers across the state and introduce Eric Holcomb and build support with just 80 days left until Election Day! **Every minute of volunteer time is CRITICAL to ensure victory on November 8th.

We absolutely need your help next Saturday. [**Would you spare an hour or two to knock on doors in your hometown or make phone calls to voters from wherever you may be?**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/f1a5f7d224ed4733a1448d8942eff156?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1322ae0c17d24d6c819430cce03b31fc&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=body_logo_cta_1&utm_term=Campaign&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160820-saturday-plans-13704-direct)

We've invested in a system that allows our volunteers to make calls from anywhere in the world — so you can call from anywhere including the comfort of your home! Our door-to-door app couldn't be easier to use and our field staff will be happy to train you on it from a field office in your area.

If you can help for any amount of time next Saturday, August 27th, for Super Saturday, [**please click here to sign up!**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/8759077b4d084bb88778ac5beeda104f?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1322ae0c17d24d6c819430cce03b31fc&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=body_logo_cta_2&utm_term=Campaign&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160820-saturday-plans-13704-direct)

On to victory,
Dan Hennessey
Statewide Field Director |
| Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs & political committees are not limited.
Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. |
| |

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Thank you so much for helping us meet our mid-August fundraising goal! I'm always overwhelmed by the commitment and generosity of our supporters. You understand the stakes in this election, friend, and you power our campaign. We couldn't be more appreciative of your help.

We are about to enter the most intense part of this campaign season. There are less than 10 weeks until Early Voting begins in Maryland. We'll need everyone on board to support our ground campaign and make sure we reach as many voters across the state as possible in the weeks ahead.

**[If you have time to volunteer to help our team, we can use someone like you, friend. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a31/70cdc2ba/470b5e53/3977bcf/1436132016/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/volunteer-for-chris?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+If+you+have+time+to+volunteer+to+help+ou&utm_campaign=em081916_1&source=em081916_1")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a31/70cdc2ba/470b5e53/3977bcc/1436132016/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/volunteer-for-chris?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em081916_1&source=em081916_1") Thank you also to everyone who was able to join our Maryland Coordinated Kickoff event in Silver Spring. The energy and enthusiasm that fills a room when we all come together is contagious -- and that's what will power us through to victory on November 8.

Thanks again -- for everything,

Chris
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a31/70cdc2ba/470b5e53/3977bcd/1436132016/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em081916_1&source=em081916_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: One-trick Trump
body:
We need to reject Trump. | Peter --

It's hard for me to believe we've spent more than a year of our lives watching the endless reality TV campaign of Donald Trump.

But I think in that time I've discovered the secret to his staying power on the stump. It has nothing to do at all with qualifications, grasp of the issues, or the right policies. If he has any of those things, he's chosen not to showcase them.

Rather, Trump is the master of personal attacks and undermining the public faith in his opponents' worth. Whether it's Hillary Clinton, the Democratic Party as a whole, the media, our men and women in uniform and their families, immigrants -- you name it, Trump has used schoolyard taunts to try and reduce anyone who will stand up to him.

But that's all he has. Trump has but a single arrow in his quiver.

So far, he hasn't needed more. But day after day, the American people by and large are rejecting this divisive strategy and proving we're better than this as a country. However, we still can't take anything for granted. **And that's why we have to double down. Will you? Pitch in for the first time to get a free sticker and take a stand against Trump and his awful attacks:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Smearing, assailing, or denigrating his opponents' honesty, or looks, or gender, or height, or ethnicity -- this alone has paved Trump's path to the GOP nomination. But we're not going to let it be the path to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. I am going to work my heart out every day from now until November 8th to make sure that doesn't happen, and I'm so glad you’re in Hillary’s corner, too.

Thanks,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYyOTU1MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYzNjAxMDYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: We need to reject Trump. | Peter -- It's hard for me to believe we've spent more than a year of our lives watching the endless reality TV campaign of Donald Trump. But I think in that time I've discovered the secret to his staying power on the stump. It has nothing to do at all with qualifications, grasp of the issues, or the right policies. If he has any of those things, he's chosen not to showcase them. Rather, Trump is the master of personal attacks and undermining the public faith in his opponents' worth. Whether it's Hillary Clinton, the Democratic Party as a whole, the media, our men and women in uniform and their families, immigrants -- you name it, Trump has used schoolyard taunts to try and reduce anyone who will stand up to him. But that's all he has. Trump has but a single arrow in his quiver. So far, he hasn't needed more. But day after day, the American people by and large are rejecting this divisive strategy and proving we're better than this as a country. However, we still can't take anything for granted. And that's why we have to double down. Will you? Pitch in for the first time to get a free sticker and take a stand against Trump and his awful attacks: Smearing, assailing, or denigrating his opponents' honesty, or looks, or gender, or height, or ethnicity -- this alone has paved Trump's path to the GOP nomination. But we're not going to let it be the path to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. I am going to work my heart out every day from now until November 8th to make sure that doesn't happen, and I'm so glad you’re in Hillary’s corner, too. Thanks, Donna Donna Brazile Chair Democratic National Committee | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
